mapper.select: select (select count(*) from youth_info where deleted = 0) as youth_count, (select count(*) from enterprise_info where deleted = 0) as enterprise_count, (select count(*) from job_post where deleted = 0) as job_count, (select count(*) from policy_article where deleted = 0) as policy_count
select youth_type as type, count(*) as total from youth_info where deleted = 0 group by youth_type order by youth_type

select y.school_province_code as regionCode, p.region_name as regionName, count(*) as total from youth_info y left join sys_region p on p.region_code = y.school_province_code and p.deleted = 0 where y.deleted = 0 and y.youth_type = 'COLLEGE' and y.school_province_code is not null and y.school_province_code != '' group by y.school_province_code, p.region_name order by total desc, y.school_province_code

select y.native_county_code as regionCode, c.region_name as regionName, count(*) as total from youth_info y left join sys_region c on c.region_code = y.native_county_code and c.deleted = 0 left join sys_region city on city.id = c.parent_id and city.deleted = 0 where y.deleted = 0 and y.youth_type = 'COLLEGE' and y.native_county_code is not null and y.native_county_code != '' and city.region_code = '630200' group by y.native_county_code, c.region_name, c.sort_no order by c.sort_no, y.native_county_code
select title, issuing_organization, publish_time, status from policy_article where deleted = 0 order by publish_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}

select j.job_name, e.enterprise_name, j.publish_time, j.contact_person from job_post j left join enterprise_info e on e.id = j.enterprise_id and e.deleted = 0 where j.deleted = 0 order by j.publish_time desc, j.id desc limit #{limit}
